display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PROPOSED delta from gradient + regime
energy: +0.050 (current = 0.62, home = 0.45)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
STAGE 1 . MEAN REVERSION (adds a pull toward home)
dist = home - cur = 0.45 - 0.62 = -0.17
pull = (0.015 + 0.04 x 0.17) x 1.0 = 0.0218
reversion_delta = dist x pull = -0.17 x 0.0218 = -0.0037
delta: +0.050 - 0.0037 = +0.0463

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
STAGE 2 . STEP CLAMP (personality cap +/- 0.012)
+0.0463 exceeds +0.012
delta clamped to +0.012 . (>= 0.006, survives)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
STAGE 3 . BUDGET
cost = |0.012| x cost_scale(30) = 0.36
budget enough?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
scale = 0.18 / total_cost
e.g. x0.5 -> delta +0.006
budget -> 0 (throttled)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
STAGE 4 . VALUE CLAMP (range 0.0-0.80, floor 0.25)
0.62 + 0.012 = 0.632 (within bounds)
applied: energy 0.62 -> 0.632

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
NET RESULT
asked for +0.050, applied +0.012 (ample budget)
or +0.006 (throttled)
friction turned a 0.050 grab into a ~0.012 step

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
budget refill = 200 / 600 s = 0.33 / s
+1.5/s bonus when someone is engaged

svg.text: A7.3b RESIST worked example — one proposed nudge to 'energy' through the friction stack
